description: DQ rule patterns for collision resolution validation. @dq-rule-writer must evaluate each pattern when concept normalization involves multi-source concepts.

patterns.description: After collision resolution, each canonical concept must appear at most once per entity-period grain
patterns.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT {entity_id}, canonical_concept, {period_fields}, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM {table} GROUP BY {entity_id}, canonical_concept, {period_fields} HAVING cnt > 1)

patterns.description: Source tags used in conformed data should match primary_sources ordering from collision rules
patterns.note: Implemented as a programmatic check, not pure SQL
